# Dibbayajyoti Roy — Full Professional Profile

## Identity

- **Name**: Dibbayajyoti Roy
- **Also known as**: Dibyajyoti Roy, Dibyojyoti Roy
- **Role**: Full Stack Software Engineer
- **Employer**: Yupcha Softwares Pvt. Ltd (since July 2025)
- **Location**: Agartala, West Tripura, India
- **Education**: B.Tech in Computer Science, ICFAI University Tripura (Class of 2026)
- **Website**: https://dibbayajyoti.com

## Technical Skills

### Primary Stack
- **Languages**: TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust, Python
- **Frontend**: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- **Backend**: Node.js, HonoJS, ElysiaJS, Rust (Actix/Axum)
- **Infrastructure**: Docker, Linux, Git
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, Redis
- **Architecture**: REST APIs, microservices, SaaS platforms

### Areas of Focus
- High-performance systems programming with Rust
- Production-grade SaaS platform development
- Web performance optimization and Core Web Vitals
- Modern design systems and UI engineering
- AI/ML pipeline integration

## Professional Experience

### Full Stack Software Engineer — Yupcha Softwares Pvt. Ltd (July 2025–Present)
- Building production-grade SaaS platforms
- Automating operational workflows across engineering teams
- Building systems for HR, employee management, and AI-driven interviewing
- Integrating REST APIs and creating user-facing dashboards

## Projects

### EMS (Employee Management System)
- **Stack**: Rust, React
- **Description**: Real-time employee management system with payroll and policy-based management
- **Repository**: https://github.com/DibbayajyotiRoy/Rust-FullStack-App

### LunarSite
- **Stack**: Python, ML pipelines
- **Description**: AI-based prediction system for lunar mineral composition, built during NITA-ISRO hackathon
- **Repository**: https://github.com/DibbayajyotiRoy/LunarSite

### BloodLink
- **Stack**: Full Stack Web
- **Description**: Matching platform for blood donors and seekers with real-time discovery and registration workflows
- **Repository**: https://github.com/DibbayajyotiRoy/BloodLink

### CarbonFootprintTracker
- **Stack**: AI/ML, Web
- **Description**: AI-powered sustainability app that calculates individual emissions and provides smart recommendations
- **Repository**: https://github.com/DibbayajyotiRoy/Carbon-Tracker

## Awards & Honors

- **Winner** — NITA Arjuna 2.0 National Hackathon (2025)
- **Winner** — Technovate Project Exhibition
- **1st Runner-Up** — NITA–ISRO Space Hackathon (2024)

## Philosophy

Dibbayajyoti's engineering philosophy centers on building software that is both robust and efficient. Rust has been transformative for his approach — moving from building web apps to designing reliable systems. He values performance, safety, and developer experience equally.

He is particularly interested in:
- Contributing to core infrastructure projects
- Building high-performance engines and tools
- Edge computing and real-time systems
- The Rust ecosystem and community
